name: Luxury Da Nang Golf Holiday 5 days
highlights: Soak in breathtaking views from the iconic Golden Bridge
Enjoy the world-class Ba Na Hills Golf Club, surrounded by lush mountains and cool highland breezes
Immerse yourself in the rich heritage of Hoi An, where lantern-lit streets and ancient architecture tell centuries-old stories
Unwind on Da Nang’s pristine beaches, where golden sands and crystal-clear waters invite pure relaxation

itinerary.title: Da Nang Arrival
itinerary.description: The trip begins when you land at Da Nang International Airport, where our friendly driver will greet you for a smooth transfer to your hotel. You may take in the first views of this coastal city during your ride. After checking in at your hotel, take a rest before exploring My Khe Beach with its soft golden sands on your own. You can sample fresh seafood at the local markets by the Han River in the evening.

itinerary.title: Golf at Ba Na Hills Golf Club
itinerary.description: On the second day, you will travel to Ba Na Hills Golf Club, located in the lush mountains of Central Vietnam. The journey might offer breathtaking views, enhancing your anticipation for the day’s play. We ensure that your transfer to this world-class venue is both comfortable and enjoyable, setting the tone for a memorable experience. Upon arrival, you will encounter the championship course designed by golf legend Luke Donald, featuring 18 holes that challenge every level of golfer. You might find yourself navigating fairways that wind through the tropical landscape while enjoying panoramic m...

itinerary.title: Ba Na Hill Full Day
itinerary.description:
Morning

Your day will begin with an early morning pickup from your hotel in Da Nang between 07:45 and 08:00. We will make our way to Ba Na Hills, a destination known for its breathtaking landscapes and unique attractions. The journey promises stunning views and anticipation for the adventures that await you. At the Suoi Mo Cable Car Station, you will board a cable car that will transport you through breathtaking mountain landscapes. You might capture stunning panoramic views while ascending to Marseille Station, where the famous Golden Bridge awaits your exploration

itinerary.title: Golf at Hoiana Shores Golf Club - Transfer to Hoi An
itinerary.description: The trip will continue with a transfer to Hoiana Shores Golf Club. It is a premier coastal golf destination designed by renowned golfer Greg Norman. You might appreciate the course’s strategic layout that blends seamlessly with the natural coastal landscape. We ensure your journey to this world-class golfing venue is comfortable and anticipation-filled. The championship course will challenge your golfing skills with its unique design featuring stunning ocean views and carefully positioned bunkers

itinerary.title: Da Nang Departure
itinerary.description: Your final morning begins with a delightful breakfast at the hotel, capturing the last essence of Vietnamese hospitality. You will reflect on the incredible memories created during your Central Vietnam adventure. We ensure your smooth transfer to Da Nang International Airport will mark a perfect conclusion to your extraordinary journey!

included: Golf rate applied for 01 golfer play 18 holes include: Green fee, caddie fee & ½ buggy fee
Overnight in shared Twin/ Double  room with Air-condition (AC) at hotel.
All transport during the tour on air-conditioned vehicle as per itinerary (including airport pick up & see off)
Meals as indicated in the program
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
